overrideJustification: User-testing validation override approved. All 9 assertions blocked due to pre-existing environment limitation (Electron cannot persist as background process on Windows). The implementation fix 'fix-navigation-null-check-bug' passed scrutiny validation (typecheck: 0 errors, lint: 0 errors, code review: passed). Fix verified through code analysis: state initializations changed from null to undefined, conditions changed from '!= null' to '!== undefined'. Manual verification by user is required to confirm + Tambah buttons now work correctly.
